title: anisomeles ornans
intro: Anisomeles ornans is a shrub native to tropical and subtropical regions, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Anisomeles ornans include its potential to alleviate fever, treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and exhibit antiseptic properties to promote wound healing. Anisomeles ornans is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and can also be used in the form of essential oils or dried extracts for medicinal purposes.
